title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: October 12, 2023
summary: October 12 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , at a large (but lower than last week) rate of 10.67% , from the level on 10/05/2023 of 5.048 M km 2 to 5.647 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory Dat...

title: Alaska SSBCI October 2023 Impact Update
summary: In just one month, loans guaranteed by Alaska’s State Small Business Credit Initiative ( SSBCI ) witnessed an extraordinary leap. From September to October, loan values soared from $8.5 million to an incredible $10.7 million, fueling the dreams of 21 innovative businesses across 14 communities. We a...
